summary: Successfully implemented all 9 CLI cart commands with full functionality including synthesis via /zo/ask API. Extended existing n5_content_cli.py with comprehensive cart management capabilities.
learnings: Database path patching needed for content_carts.py to use main content library at N5/data/content_library.db
Synthesis via /zo/ask API works seamlessly with proper error handling for missing token or API failures
Cart search implemented as simple text matching across titles, content, and notes - works effectively for user needs
Console output vs file output for synthesis provides good flexibility for different use cases
CLI structure follows existing thread/comment pattern for consistency and maintainability

synthesis_implementation.content_truncation: 5000 characters per item to avoid token limits

database_integration.cart_display: Shows item content_type, title, and optional notes

testing_performed: Search functionality across titles and notes
Synthesis with both console and file output
Help text verification for all commands
